MaxLineLength:DeathEffect.kt:DeathEffect$EnemyType.FAST -> { p.vx = (if (i % 2 == 0) 1f else -1f) * speedBase * (0.5f + Random.nextFloat()); p.vy = Random.nextFloat() * 30f - 15f }

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt:"• Duplicate cards add copies. Collect enough copies to level up (3 Common / 4 Rare / 5 Epic per level).\n"
MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt:"• Gems — earned from milestones, daily login streaks, and card packs. Spent on card packs and Lab rush.\n"
MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt:"• Power Stones — earned from weekly challenges, wave milestones, and boss kills. Spent on Ultimate Weapon upgrades.\n"
MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt:"• Upgrade button — opens the in-round upgrade menu. Spend Cash on temporary upgrades that last one round.\n\n"

MaxLineLength:HomeViewModel.kt:HomeViewModel$val achievableMilestones = Milestone.entries.count { it.requiredSteps <= profile.totalStepsEarned && it.name !in claimedIds }

MaxLineLength:HomeViewModelTest.kt:HomeViewModelTest$assertEquals(1, mission.progress, "Expected mission progress to advance to 1 after background research completion")

MaxLineLength:MainActivity.kt:MainActivity$popExitTransition = { if (reducedMotion) fadeOut(snap()) else fadeOut(tween(200)) + slideOutHorizontally(tween(200)) { it / 4 } }
MaxLineLength:MainActivity.kt:MainActivity$val enterAnim = if (reducedMotion) fadeIn(snap()) else fadeIn(tween(200)) + slideInHorizontally(tween(200)) { it / 4 }
MaxLineLength:MainActivity.kt:MainActivity$val exitAnim = if (reducedMotion) fadeOut(snap()) else fadeOut(tween(200)) + slideOutHorizontally(tween(200)) { -it / 4 }

MaxLineLength:OrbStateTest.kt:OrbStateTest$// angularSpeed PI/2 rad/s over dt 1s → angle PI/2 → x ~ zigX, y ~ zigY + R (radius MID at phase 0... phase also advances)
MaxLineLength:OrbStateTest.kt:OrbStateTest$val s = OrbState(zigX = 0f, zigY = 0f, angle = 0f, angularSpeed = (Math.PI / 2).toFloat(), initialRadialPhase = 0f)

MaxLineLength:PlayerProfileDao.kt:PlayerProfileDao$@Query("UPDATE player_profile SET currentStepBalance = MAX(0, currentStepBalance + :delta), totalStepsEarned = CASE WHEN :delta > 0 THEN totalStepsEarned + :delta ELSE totalStepsEarned END WHERE id = 1")
MaxLineLength:PlayerProfileDao.kt:PlayerProfileDao$@Query("UPDATE player_profile SET currentStepBalance = currentStepBalance - :cost WHERE id = 1 AND currentStepBalance >= :cost")
MaxLineLength:PlayerProfileDao.kt:PlayerProfileDao$@Query("UPDATE player_profile SET gems = gems - :amount, totalGemsSpent = totalGemsSpent + :amount WHERE id = 1 AND gems >= :amount")

MaxLineLength:PlayerProfileDao.kt:PlayerProfileDao$@Query("UPDATE player_profile SET powerStones = powerStones - :amount, totalPowerStonesSpent = totalPowerStonesSpent + :amount WHERE id = 1 AND powerStones >= :amount")

MaxLineLength:PlayerProfileDao.kt:PlayerProfileDao$@Query("UPDATE player_profile SET totalRoundsPlayed = totalRoundsPlayed + :rounds, totalEnemiesKilled = totalEnemiesKilled + :kills, totalCashEarned = totalCashEarned + :cash WHERE id = 1")

MaxLineLength:UpgradeType.kt:UpgradeType.Companion$MULTISHOT to UpgradeConfig(5_000, 1.5, 10, 1.0, "+1 additional target per level (in-round Cash purchase or Labs research; cap 11 incl. baseline)")

MaxLineLength:UpgradeType.kt:UpgradeType.Companion$STEP_MULTIPLIER to UpgradeConfig(1_000, 1.35, 100, 1.0, "Bonus steps from walking — asymptotic curve approaches +100%")

MaxLineLength:WaveAnnouncement.kt:WaveAnnouncement$val alpha = if (age < holdDuration) 255 else ((1f - (age - holdDuration) / fadeDuration) * 255).toInt().coerceIn(0, 255)

MaxLineLength:WaveSpawner.kt:WaveSpawner$wave <= 30 -> mapOf(EnemyType.TANK to 0.10, EnemyType.RANGED to 0.15, EnemyType.FAST to 0.20, EnemyType.BASIC to 0.55)

MaxLineLength:WorkshopViewModelTest.kt:WorkshopViewModelTest$assertFalse(item.canAfford, "${type.name} at cap must NOT be affordable (drives disabled buy control) even with MAX_VALUE balance")
MaxLineLength:ZigguratEntity.kt:ZigguratEntity$private val rangeStrokePaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply { color = 0x44FFFFFF; style = Paint.Style.STROKE; strokeWidth = 1.5f }
TooGenericExceptionThrown:BattleViewModelTest.kt:BattleViewModelTest.<no name provided>$throw RuntimeException("simulated DB failure on updateBestWave")

TopLevelPropertyNaming:Color.kt:/** * Text/icon colour for content ON [Gold] surfaces (primary buttons). The brand [DeepBronze] * (#6B3A2A) on Gold is only ~4.19:1 — Material3 `Button` labels are `labelLarge` 14sp SemiBold * ("normal" text, 4.5:1 threshold), so DeepBronze fails AA (#213). This darker bronze is ~5.99:1 on * Gold (passes AA-normal). Use [OnGold] as `onPrimary`; keep [DeepBronze] for fills/backgrounds. * Guarded by `ContrastTest` (which reads [OnGoldArgb] vs [GoldArgb] so a token regression fails the build). */ const val OnGoldArgb: Int = 0xFF4A2618.toInt()

TopLevelPropertyNaming:Color.kt:// --- Core Mesopotamian palette (the five brand colours) ----------------------------------------- // These are the identity anchors. Use them for fills, brand accents, and primary actions. // Gold's ARGB is exposed as a plain Int const so the pure-JVM `ContrastTest` can verify on-Gold text // contrast against the SAME value the token uses (no Compose/Android dependency in the test). #213. const val GoldArgb: Int = 0xFFD4A843.toInt()
VariableNaming:CalculateDamage.kt:CalculateDamage$val final_ = if (isCrit) raw * stats.critMultiplier else raw
VariableNaming:EnemyScalingTest.kt:EnemyScalingTest$private val COMBAT_MULTIPLIER = 3.0 // Crits + in-round upgrades + multishot + orbs
VariableNaming:TierProgressionTest.kt:TierProgressionTest$private val COMBAT_MULTIPLIER = 5.0 // Crits + in-round upgrades + multishot + orbs + cards
